basic_details.job_title: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER), Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: NISER Bhubaneswar is recruiting for 1 Project Fellow position on a temporary basis.

qualification.details: The candidate is expected to contribute to testing/optimizing new techniques, maintain lab records, handle data and lab materials, participate in sample collection from local hospitals, and work effectively in a team with good communication skills.
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (minimum 60% marks) in Life Sciences / Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Molecular Biology / Microbiology / Zoology / Physiology / Bioinformatics or equivalent streams in Biosciences.

how_to_apply: Interested Indian nationals should send the following documents by email to [email protected] by 17th July 2026 (5 PM):
Duly filled application form (available in the advertisement)
Self-attested copies of educational certificates, birth certificate, and work experience certificates (if any)
Subject Line: “Application for the post of a Project Fellow”
Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Online Interview via Google Meet on 22nd July 2026.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. It does not lead to any PhD degree at NISER. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. For any clarification, contact: Dr. Asima Bhattacharyya at [email protected]

content_sections.heading: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NISER Bhubaneswar is recruiting for 1 Project Fellow position on a temporary basis.

rows.national_institute_of_science_education_: Unlocking early diagnosis by discovery and screening of circulatory biomarkers from extracellular vesicles of gastric cancer patients with the goal to develop a robust risk-stratification model

content_sections.heading: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date to Send Application by Email

content_sections.heading: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow - Vacancy Details
NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The candidate is expected to contribute to testing/optimizing new techniques, maintain lab records, handle data and lab materials, participate in sample collection from local hospitals, and work effectively in a team with good communication skills.

rows.details: M.Sc. (minimum 60% marks) in Life Sciences / Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Molecular Biology / Microbiology / Zoology / Physiology / Bioinformatics or equivalent streams in Biosciences.

Qualifying in National level exams (CSIR-UGC NET / GATE). Prior hands-on experience in mammalian cell culture, western blotting, immunostaining, fluorescence microscopy, H&E staining, statistical data analysis, etc.
28 years as on 17.07.2026 (relaxation as per rules).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested Indian nationals should send the following documents by email to [email protected] by 17th July 2026 (5 PM): Subject Line: “Application for the post of a Project Fellow” Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Online Interview via Google Meet on 22nd July 2026.

content_sections.heading: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. It does not lead to any PhD degree at NISER. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. For any clarification, contact: Dr. Asima Bhattacharyya at [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must send the application by email by 17th July 2026 (5 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Fellow at NISER Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly emoluments are ₹30,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for NISER Project Fellow in Biological Sciences?
faq.answer: M.Sc. with minimum 60% marks in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or related fields.

faq.question: Q4. When is the online interview for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled for 22nd July 2026 at about 11 AM via Google Meet.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form, CV, and supporting documents to [email protected] with the proper subject line.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: Maximum 28 years as on 17.07.2026 (relaxation applicable for entitled categories).

faq.question: Q7. Is prior research experience mandatory for NISER Project Fellow?
faq.answer: It is desirable. Hands-on experience in cell culture, western blotting, microscopy, and data analysis will be preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Is the NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary for 1 year (extendable based on performance) and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q9. Does the Project Fellow position at NISER lead to PhD?
faq.answer: No, the position does not lead to any PhD degree at NISER.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to Advertisement No. NISER / R&D / BI 2604 / 16 / 2026-27 on the NISER official website.
